entry.title: LSMW - RFBIDE00 - No data
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

I have a problem with an LSMW based in program RFBIDE00. All is correct until the end. When we try to create the batch input the message is that "the file doesn't contain data". However, in the step of read transactions I can see the values.

Could you help me? Why the generated batch input doesn't contain data?

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Security: How to use mTLS with Destinations
entry.content: great info thx

entry.title: Re: I am facing an issue with running the build mta file
entry.content:
The error message itself explains the root cause clearly, you must have a package-lock.json file in your project. Following is from "npm ci" help document.

The main differences between using npm install and npm ci are:

  • The project must have an existing package-lock.json or npm-shrinkwrap.json.
  • If dependencies in the package lock do not match those in package.json, npm ci will exit with an error, instead of updating the package lock.

entry.title: Can´t add a returnable packaging to an inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello.

I have the following situation to fit to SAP S4 Hana Cloud Public Edition:

My client uses a returnable packaging. Its received from the supplier when the client buy any product (raw materials, trading goods, etc). But it is not returned to the supplier. Instead of sending it back to the supplier, my client reuses it to send goods to customers. And the customers return the returnable packaging. And those returnable packages returned will be sent to another customers and returned back. 

The parts of sending the returnable packaging for the customers and receiving it back from them are ok, totally covered by the Returnables Processing (BDW) scope item.

 

But I´m not being able to do on the system the part of receiving the returnable packaging from the supplier when the inbound delivery of a purchase order arrives.

When I try to add the returnable packaging as an item of the inbound delivery on the app Change Inbound Deliveries, it does not show the returnable packaging product. 

I have also tried to make an HU with it, but its not possible either (error message: RP001 is not a packaging material. Enter a valid packaging material). 

 

Does anyone has an ideia on how to handle it?

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content:
Thank you @Tomas_Buryanek   Yes. ENHANCEMENT switch is off. I will not activate. So how can I make a development behind the FB08 save button?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: custom splash screen for mdk branded client
entry.content:
thanks @robinkuck,

and does the background and splash_logo go in the same folder? do they have resolution requirements like the icon?

entry.title: CalendarIntegration status refresh issue on Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I noticed that CalendarIntegration.getCalendarEventById(<ID>).getStatus() returns the event status as it was at the time the page was loaded. If the status of that event changes between the page load and the execution of the script CalendarIntegration.getCalendarEventById(SV_Sheet).getStatus(), the output remains the same. Is there a way to refresh the CalendarIntegration, or is it necessary to force a page refresh?

entry.title: BAS Remote Extension Host Terminated
entry.content:
I started getting this annoying popup message in BAS that keeps coming up every few minutes

It doesn't say which extension is failing. It also keeps opening Storyline tab for my project. Very disruptive.

The only help I could find online is people saying install local VSCode instead. I can't do that in our client environments.

Can someone please tell me how to rectify this situation? I've opened an SAP ticket, but they have not responded now for a long time.

Would appreciate any help. Thanks

entry.title: Re: Scheduling BI 4.3 reports to Microsoft drives (SharePoint / OneDrive / Teams)
entry.content: We're trying to schedule to Sharepoint Online i.e "SharePoint in Microsoft 365" but it seems not supported as mentioned in Note "2539761 - BI 4.x support for Microsoft SharePoint Online / Office 365 (cloud offerings)". Has anyone been able to find a workaround for this!

entry.title: What is the object type of supplier invoice in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community!

 

We would like to send for the supplier invoice an attachment link through API (API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV) .

In this API we have to identify the BusinessObjectTypeName, which i couldn't see in our system (SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud,release 2408).

How can we get this information in our system easily or is there any list of existing business object types somewhere whic we can use for this case?

Tank you,

Csaba

entry.title: Freight Units Not Created When Using Document-Specific Addresses
entry.content:
We are using S/4HANA in an on-premise version with basic Transportation Management (TM).

In our system, document-specific addresses for the ship-to party are sometimes used in sales order documents. However, in these cases, no freight units are created for the subsequent deliveries. Additionally, no locations are generated, which seems to be the root cause of the missing freight units. I would have expected that one-time locations would be created in such scenarios.

Is there a configuration or setting to ensure that locations and, consequently, freight units are generated for documents with document-specific addresses?

Thank you in advance for any guidance!

entry.title: Re: Why isn't the "enhancement" I added working?
entry.content: removed

entry.title: Publishing values to a recurring pay component from Variable Pay to EC
entry.content:
Hi,

could you please confirm if it is possible to publish a bonus payout from Variable Pay to a recurring pay component in Employee Central? I was able to add the necessary code to the XML without encountering any errors, but nothing appears in the UI. I'm unsure if this is due to a bug or if the functionality is not supported. Unfortunately, I cannot test this as we are working directly in the production environment.
Thank you for your help!

Laura

entry.title: MDK : Changes done on VS code are not reflecting in my Andriod Simulator
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 
I have setup SSAM debuging setup on windows desktop with VS code and Android simulator. 
My new changes done in VS code are not reflecting on my Andriod simulator, changes were reflecting previously but it is not working after i maintained the BaseProject name in MDKProject.json file and built SSAM client.
"BaseProject": "SAPAssetManager",
Do i need to maintain anything for custom project in MDKProject.json file. 

bill_froelich & muhammad_rafay  Can you please help with this issue.

Thanks
Madhukar G

entry.title: Re: MIC that will result in Inspection lot with Sampling record types Q61, Q62 & Q63 (QM-IDI)
entry.content: How did you resolved it ?

entry.title: Error in groovy script - The entity "nbsp" was referenced, but not declared
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have used a script which was running fine but suddenly there is an error seen as mentioned below-

 
Error Details
com.sap.xi.mapping.camel.XiMappingException: The entity "nbsp" was referenced, but not declared., cause: org.xml.sax.SAXParseException; lineNumber: 7; columnNumber: 200; The entity "nbsp" was referenced, but not declared.
 
On checking the payload I can see a &nbsp character seen in the input which is causing the error.
Input Payload
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ServiceNowIncident>
    <Incident>
        <ADONumber>40000</ADONumber>
        <State></State>
        <AssignedTo></AssignedTo>
        <AdditionalComments>SRIVASTAVA Nidhi (External) Hello Laurent, thank you for sharing the examples. We are investigating and come back to you with the solution. Best regards, Val</AdditionalComments>
    </Incident>
</ServiceNowIncident>
 
The groovy used is mentioned in the below blog, bit different but more or less the same. 
Solved: Structure Formatting for Receiver in SAP CPI throu... - SAP Community
 
Please suggest if this can be achieved easily, as there are already many conditions checked in the script and adding more should not hamper the existing one as this is already running in production.
 
Thanks,
Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: Re: Looping Condition not getting executed in Local Integ...
entry.content:
Hi Kiran,

I tried as suggested by you, but it is still executing only once.

Let me know if any other variations can be tried?

Thanks,

Nidhi Srivastava

entry.title: How to upload an empty value to remove the existing value from the system? SAP Fieldglass
entry.content:
Dear all, 

While doing upload in SAP Fieldglass how can I upload an empty field in the CSV file (if cell is left empty system will consider that there is not change). My scope is to remove the description from all JP templates. 

I tried "" and "NULL" and '' nothing works

Any ideas ?

entry.title: Re: How to get the list of objects which is using a particular filter condition
entry.content: Hi , can you please share the query that you created on _SYS_REPO.ACTIVE_OBJECT to identify the filter conditions

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Good day All. I am fairly new to SAP Community. I have been using SAP as an end user for over 5 years now, and created my SAP universal ID a couple years back. So recently, I decided to join the  community so I can continue to learn and be able to ask questions and equally contribute to questions I can answer. As an end user, I have used SAP to manage asset maintenance, procurement, inventory, reporting, work execution, planning etc. I am really looking forward to how SAP Community will assist in my growth journey.

entry.title: Re: Installing SAP NetWeaver Developer Edition on an Ubuntu desktop VM - the non-concise guide
entry.content:
I realise that the comments are no longer up to date, but I've just fallen into the same trap as custandcode:
You probably got two warnings before the error messages, which are the actual cause:
Ubuntu 24.04. comes with a glibc > 2.35, which does not work with older Sybase versions (https://me.sap.com/notes/3425215)

entry.title: Re: Integrate C4P-Resource Management with SAP Analytics Cloud or SAP DataSphere
entry.content: What to specifically create Service bindings?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Good day All - Connecting from Calgary, Alberta, Canada

entry.title: Re: Tcode to list sales order outputs (like VL71)
entry.content: Transaction to list output for sales orders is VA71

entry.title: New Installation of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 – Part 2 – Installation
entry.content:
This blog includes installation of SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 and will focus on creating Sandbox type instance with co-deployed (embedded) gateway.

Please find other blogs as follows at S/4HANA SQUARE ONE


                  SAP S/4HANA  SQUARE  ONE

GREENFIELD IMPLEMENTATION    PART1 - MPPART2 -  Installation
PART3 -  BP Activation
PART4 - Fiori ActivationPART5 - DATA MIGRATION
S/4HANA 2023fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps1 fps0

fps2 fps1 fps0

 
S/4HANA 2022fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0 
S/4HANA 2021fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0 
S/4HANA 2020fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps2 fps1 fps0fps0


STEP 1: OPERATING SYSTEM

It is recommended to install SuSE Linux or RedHat Linux. Refer
SAP Note 2235581 - SAP HANA: Supported Operating Systems.
SAP Note 2399995 - Hardware requirement for SAP HANA 2.0
SAP Note 2620910 - SAP S/4HANA 1511, 1610, 1709 and SAP BW/4HANA 1.0: Recommended Application Server Platforms

SAP Note 3108303 - SAP HANA DB: Recommended OS Settings for RHEL 9
SAP Note 2684254 - SAP HANA DB: Recommended OS settings for SLES 15 / SLES for SAP Applications 15

You can check your operating system version as below:

sid-hdb-s4h:~ # cat /etc/os-release

 NAME="SLES"

 VERSION="15-SP5"

 VERSION_ID="15.5"

 PRETTY_NAME="SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15 SP5"

STEP 2: SAP HANA DATABASE

It is recommended to install minimum SAP HANA 2.0 SP07 rev76
SAP Note 2655761 - SAP S/4HANA - restrictions and recommendations regarding specific revisions of SAP HANA database for use in SAP S/4HANA
SAP Note 3545537 - SAP HANA DB: SAP HotNews in HANA 2.0 SPS08
SAP Note 3531605 - SAP HANA 2 SPS08 Revision 080.00  <= Current at S/4HANA 2023 FPS2 release
SAP Note 2423367 - Multitenant database containers will become the standard and only operation mode
SAP Note 2469025 - How-To: Upgrading to SAP HANA 2.0

We will install HANA database through SWPM. So you need to have the SAR file IMDB_SERVER20_080_0-80002031.SAR available along with SAP HANA  Client IMDB_CLIENT20_022_32-80002082.SAR

After S/4HANA and HANA Database are installed please follow SAP Note 2600030 - Parameter Recommendations in SAP HANA Environments for parameter recommendations. This note contains check scripts which detect SAP HANA version, SAP product installed, etc. and give specific parameter recommendations.

TIP: Please change the log mode if you don’t want to be spend time on log maintenance: 

In HANA studio –> Configuration –> global.ini –> persistence and set the parameter log_mode to overwrite. 

When you change the log mode, you must restart the database system to activate the changes. 

It is also recommended that you perform a full data backup. You can also set the log_mode to ‘overwrite’ 

using the following SQL-Statement:

 

ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('persistence', 'log_mode') = 'overwrite' WITH RECONFIGURE;

STEP 3: SAP S/4HANA INSTALLATION USING SWPM

TIP: You don't need to extract the backup zip files S4CORE108_INST_EXPORT_*.zip. SWPM tool will extract them into /usr/sap/HDB/HDB02/backup/data/DB_HDB. Ensure sufficient space of 100GB is available in this folder.

We will use the procedure for SWPM+SUM combined installation and you don't need the SYSTEM/DDIC password from backup Database/ABAP instance.

Extract the SWPM SAR file as below

sid-hdb:/ # cd /install 

sid-hdb:/install # /sapmedia/SAPCAR -xvf /sapmedia/download/SWPM20SP19_1-80003424.SAR

You should get message at the end of this that SAPCAR: ... files(s) extracted

Execute SWPM to do system copy with backup restore as below:
sid-hdb:/install#./sapinst SAPINST_USE_HOSTNAME=vhcals4hci  SAPINST_STACK_XML=/sapmedia/download/MP_Stack_1002146477_20241122_.xml

I started with command:
./sapinst SAPINST_USE_HOSTNAME=vhcals4hci  SAPINST_STACK_XML=/sapmedia/download/MP_Stack_1002146477_20241122_.xml

This is ok for sandbox.

I am showing only the important screens as most are self explanatory. Select Standard System from path below:

Click on Next

At the screen Software Integrity click on Next

TIP1: If you select Typical at next parameter, those skipped are shown in Strikethrough. 

Skipping these parameters will save some time and you may be able to change them in the final Parameter Summary.

If you need integrated web dispatcher please select Custom.

TIP2: To take less time for installation I have copied the kernel files into a subdirectory of download so that it takes less time to scan & search for media. Also copy files S4CORE108_INST_EXPORT* into separate folder.

At the screen Parameter Settings select Custom and click on Next

At the screen General SAP System Parameters accept SAP System ID (SAPSID) S4H SAP Mount Directory /sapmnt

At the screen DNS Domain Name (strikethrough font means dialog is skipped if you select "Typical" option in the beginning) set FQDN for SAP system checked, DNS Domain Name for SAP System dummy.nodomain click on Next

At the screen Master Password specify Master password and confirm password Xxxxxxxn click on Next

At the screen Operating System Users accept master password or enter password Xxxxxxxn

At the screen SAP HANA Database for SAP System enter details
Database Host   vhcalhdbdb
Database ID (DBSID)HDB
Instance Number   02
Password of DBA  Xxxxxxxn  click on Next

At the screen SAP HANA Multitenant Database Containers enter password for HANA Database superuser Xxxxxxxn click on Next

At the screen Software Package Browser enter path for the downloaded media from Maintenance Planner. Package Path: /sapmedia/download click Next
The status will change from "still missing" to "Available". Click on Next

At the screen Prerequisites Checker Results please resolve or ignore any issues. Click on Next.

At the screen Upgrade SAP Host Agent checkmark Upgrade SAP Host Agent with provided version and click on Next , after it is shown as "Available". Click on Next

At the screen Configuration of SAP liveCache with SAP HANA accept uncheck on Install SAP liveCache for SAP System and click on Next
TIP: We will be installing HANA DB through SWPM, and this option has to be uncheck to proceed further

At the screen Media Browser enter Package Path /sapmedia/download/exp click on Next.

TIP: SWPM takes 20 minutes to verify and check the zip files

Individual Package Location will change to
/sapmedia/download/exp/S4CORE108_INST_EXPORT_1.zip click on Next

At the screen Software Package Browser accept Individual Package Locations  /sapmedia/download/exp/S4CORE108_INST_EXPORT_[2..30].zip

At the screen Software Package Browser enter location of HANA Database file /sapmedia/hana2/IMDB_SERVER20_80_0-80002031.SAR Click on Next

At the screen General SAP HANA Database Parameters accept defaults for Instance Number and SAP Mount Directory and click on Next

At the screen HANA Database Administrator accept defaults and click on Next 

TIP: If you need to install additional software, at this point it is better to ensure the files SAPPAAPL4_2203_2-80004547.ZIP and HANAUMML12_7-70001054.ZIP are copied to the folder /sapmedia/hana2 

At the screen SAP HANA Additional Archives select checkmark for Install HANA software for PAi Click on Next. This step will select HANA Automated Predictive Library and HANA DU for Unified Model Manager.

At the screen Database Schema accept schema DBACOCKPIT password and confirm Schema password Xxxxxxxn click on Next

At the screen Database Schema accept schema SAPHANADB password and confirm Schema password Xxxxxxxn click on Next

At the screen SAP HANA Data at Rest Encryption accept the master password or
checkmark on Set Root Key Backup Password to enter password and click on Next 

At the screen Secure Storage for Database Connection select HANA Secure User store (hdbuserstore) click on Next 

At the screen SAP HANA Import Parameters accept parameter values to keep on import and click on Next

TIP: Please note that database log mode is Overwrite by default here and you can change if needed. Configuration File=global.ini, Section=persistence, Parameter Name=log_mode, Parameter Value=overwrite

At the screen SAP HANA Client Software Installation Path choose radio button Local Client Directory click on Next

At the screen SAP liveCache with SAP HANA checkmark on Install SAP livecache for SAP System and click on Next 

At the screen Software Package Browser select Package Path and click on Next

At the screen Primary Application Server Instance and ABAP Central Services Instance accept values PAS Instance Number 00, PAS Instance Host vhcals4hci
ASCS Instance Number 01, ASCS Instance Host Name vhcals4hci click on Next

At the screen ABAP Message Server Ports accept values for Ports 3601 and 3901 click on Next

At the screen Configuration of Work Processes accept number of Dialog Work Processes (10) and Number of Batch Work Processes (6) click on Next

At the screen ICM User Management for the SAP Web Dispatcher accept password for webadm Xxxxxxxn and click on Next

At the screen SLD Destination for the SAP System OS Level leave default radio button at No SLD destination click on Next

At the screen Message Server Access Control List leave default radio button at Do not create Message Server Access Control List click on Next

At the screen Additional Components to be Included in the ASCS Instance enable checkmarks at Install integrated web dispatcher and Install Gateway integrated in ASCS instance and click on Next

At the screen SAP Web Dispatcher Parameters leave default dispatcher parameters HTTPS Port 44301, Encryption Always, Configure HTTP Port Yes, click on Next

At the screen System Security leave default for Add Security Profile Parameters (It is upto you to set this according to security policy of the company and the type of the instance) , click on Next

At the screen Secure Storage Key Generation accept radio button – Individual Key (Recommended for Productive Systems) On the Next

At next screen Warning click OK

At the screen SAP System Users Passwords enter password for DDIC and SAP* in Client 000 click on Next

At the screen Configuring Transport Management for Single System select Run TMS config and enter password for TMSADM in Client 000 click on Next

At the screen Import SPAM/SAINT Update for Import SPAM/SAINT Update select radio button Yes
SPAM/SAINT Update as /download/KD75889.SAR and click on Next

At the screen Additional ABAP Transports leave radio button at default No for Import ABAP Transports click on Next

At the screen Additional SAP System Languages checkmark on Install Additional SAP System Languages and click on Add. click on Next

At the screen Preparing for the Software Update Manager  checkmark for Extract the SUM *.SAR archive and Start Sum Automatically. Click on Next

At the screen Software Package Browser accept Individual Package Location  /sapmedia/download/SUM20SP21_5-80002456.SAR Click on Next

At next screen Cleanup of Operating System Users checkmark on Yes cleanup os users and click on Next

Here is the Parameter Summary Click on Next to confirm and begin the installation.

At next screen 99% Information click on OK

TIP: Please click on the url https://vhcals4hci.dummy.nodomain:1129/lmsl/sumabap/S4H/doc/slui and continue with the upgrade in another browser tab. You can then continue in the sapinst tab to complete SWPM. Using the combined SWPM+SUM command with stack.xml many dialog screens are skipped.

On sapinst screen click on OK.

Fill in the Feedback to SAP. and Exit

STEP 4: ADDON INSTALLATION USING SUM TOOL

As we executed combined SWPM+SUM you should have filesystem /usr/sap/S4H/SUM and you should directly jump to url https://vhcals4hci:1129/lmsl/sumabap/S4H/doc/slui

If not, don’t worry, please extract it as below 2 commands:

as s4hadm

cd /usr/sap/S4H

SAPCAR -xvf /sapmedia/download/SUM20SP21_5-80002456.SAR

as root

ps –ef | grep –i sapup

/usr/sap/S4H/SUM/abap/SUMSTART confighostagent
TIP: Please check that your /windows/drivers/etc/host file contains entry with IP address mapped to hostname vhcals4hci.

c:\users\mahesh>type c:\windows\system32\drivers\etc\hosts

10.20.130.140  vhcals4hci vhcals4hci.dummy.nodomain vhcals4hcs vhcals4hcs.dummy.nodomain vhcalhdbdb vhcalhdbdb.dummy.nodomain

Open Google Chrome browser (latest version recommended) Enter URL:
https://vhcals4hci:1129/lmsl/sumabap/S4H/doc/slui
In case you get screen below please click on Advanced and then “Proceed to vhcals4hci(unsafe)"

Enter s4hadm/(password you used before) in the screen below

TIP: If you get message that Page is Unresponsive just click on Wait.

GET ROADMAP

TIP: If you start with sapinst command combined with SWPM+SUM, the SUM tool may skip most of the screens to reach the final stage at 90% with SPAUINFO.

At Additional Parameters for "Update on SAP S/4HANA (Single System)"
Check archive authenticity and checkmark Switch expert mode on.

EXTRACTION PHASE

No prompts here ....

TIP: If you get error manifest signature revoked download new crlbag.p7s as per SAP Note 2491577 - SUM fails at phase PREP_EXTRACT/SCAN_DOWNLOADDIR with error message "SIGNATURE: manifest signature is revoked"

CONFIGURATION PHASE

At (10%) Current Phase: PREP_EXTENSION/BIND_PATCH
Click on Next

At (13%) Current Status of Roadmap Step "Configuration"
Click on Next (may be skipped)

CHECKS PHASE

At (16%) Current Status of Roadmap Step "Checks"
Click on Next (may be skipped)

PREPROCESSING PHASE

At (60%) Current Phase MAIN_DTTRANSSHD/DOWNCONF_DTTRANS_BCK accept selected radio button Backup completed click on Next (if prompted)

Click on Next (may be skipped)

EXECUTION PHASE

At (85%) Current Phase:
End of technical Downtime, click Next (may be skipped)

POSTPROCESSING PHASE

At (90%) Current Phase: MAIN_POSTPROC/SUBMOD_SPAU_INFO/SPAUINFO
Adjust the repository objects as needed, click Next

At (94%) Current Phase: MAIN_POSTPROC/REQ_UP_FINAL
Start of Cleanup Processing, click Next (may be skipped)

At (98%) Current Phase: MAIN_POSTCLEAN/REQ_FINISH_IMPORT
Confirmation Required for Imports, check and select checkmark for I confirm that no more imports are running, click Next

SUM is completed.

Please login to the system and check the Installed product version as: Please find Installed Software Component version:

TIP: Schedule complete SGEN if it is not completed so far. This will help reduce time needed for Best Practices Content Activation.

STEP 5: SAP S/4HANA RELEASE INFORMATION NOTE

Please apply the notes as per SAP Note 3421172 - SAP S/4HANA 2023 Feature Package Stack 01: Additional Release Information these notes are only for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS0 only


NOTEDESCRIPTIONMANUAL
3469544Transfer Service order Id to EWM 
3512989Product ID for planned cost is wrong in case of product substitution 
3517754Charged cost condition appears twiceYes
3528143New delivery status "Not Delivered" service order sales and service part advance shipment items 

COMPONENT FOR INCIDENTS:

You can open OSS messages using component: for SWPM - BC-INS-SWPM for SUM - BC-UPG-TLS-TLA

OTHER REFERENCES:

Installation Guide
Administration Guide for Implementation

Administration Guide to Implementation of SAP S/4HANA 2023 with SAP Best Practices | SAP Help Portal

Your system installation is complete. Congratulations !!!

Mahesh Sardesai
Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA Regional Implementation Group

entry.title: Annual PM Hours for Work Center and Annual Work Center Capacity comparison
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to see the upcoming annual PM hours for each maintenance work center based on the existing maintenance plans for 2025.  I want to also see the annual work center capacity for 2025, so I can compare them. I would then like to graph these number monthly to see where work center capacity (Hours) is below the planned workcenter PM.

entry.title: SAP Composable Storefront and CMS Component enrichment
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Composable Storefront is an headless application responsible to run website rendering based on raw CMS data provided by OCC CMS API. 

By default, SAP Composable Storefront is using typeCode (CMS Component type) information to determine which style to apply (CSS). This aspect forces front-end developer to request a new CMS Component type of back-end developer to enrich website graphic chart. For more detail Customizing CMS Components

A better approach is to use styleClasses which is configurable text field that can indicate the style we want to apply for a specific CMS Component instance. Through this strategy, we can

  • decouple front-end and back-end development
  • use native component with many different graphic chart
  • unleash web contributors imagination

This article is guideline to show you how SAP Composable Storefront can be customized to add this capacity.

 

Override

First step is to override an existing Component mapping to apply this styleClasses information in Component template. In our example, we will override SimpleResponsiveBannerComponent which is displaying in Electronics HomePage.

Let first create a new empty Angular Module

 

ng g m custom-banner

 

Then, we need to create also a new Angular Component

 

ng g m custom-banner

 

 

Module

 After that, we need to edit the new Angular Module to add provideConfig directive for the Component overriding

custom-banner.module.ts

 

providers: [
    provideConfig({
      cmsComponents: {
        SimpleResponsiveBannerComponent: {
          component: CustomBannerComponent,
        }
      }
    })
  ]

 

Then this Module must be added in app.module.ts to be loaded at the startup

 

imports: [
    BrowserModule,
    StoreModule.forRoot({}),
    AppRoutingModule,
    EffectsModule.forRoot([]),
    SpartacusModule,
    CustomBannerModule
  ],

 

 

Component

Now we can define our Component to extend native BannerComponent. The idea is just to point on a new custom template.

custom-banner.component.ts

 

import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component } from '@angular/core';
import { BannerComponent } from '@spartacus/storefront';

@Component({
  selector: 'app-custom-banner',
  templateUrl: './custom-banner.component.html',
  changeDetection: ChangeDetectionStrategy.OnPush
})
export class CustomBannerComponent extends BannerComponent {
}

 

 

CSS inline

In this new template, we can introduce styleClasses field. In our example, we're just pushing this value in CSS inline style. styleClasses value is provided by OCC CMS API when it is filled in SmartEdit.

custom-banner.component.html

 

<ng-container *ngIf="data$ | async as data">
    <cx-generic-link
      *ngIf="routerLink"
      [url]="routerLink"
      [target]="getTarget(data)">
      <p class="headline" *ngIf="data.headline" [innerHTML]="data.headline"></p>
      <cx-media [style]="data.styleClasses" [container]="getImage(data)"></cx-media>
      <p class="content" *ngIf="data.content" [innerHTML]="data.content"></p>
    </cx-generic-link>
  </ng-container>

 

 

CSS mapping

Another approach is to setup css file in styleClasses that gathers several CSS instructions. For that, we need to add function in Component that will load dynamically the style.

getStyle(fscss: string | undefined): string | undefined{
    if (fscss) {
        fetch('/assets/' + fscss + '.css').then(res => res.text())
        .then(scss => {
            this.style = scss;
        });
        return this.style;
    }
    return undefined;
 }

Then, we need to update the template to call this new method

<ng-container *ngIf="data$ | async as data">
    <cx-generic-link
      *ngIf="routerLink"
      [url]="routerLink"
      [target]="getTarget(data)">
      <p class="headline" *ngIf="data.headline" [innerHTML]="data.headline"></p>
      <cx-media [style]="getStyle(data.styleClasses)" [container]="getImage(data)"></cx-media>
      <p class="content" *ngIf="data.content" [innerHTML]="data.content"></p>
   </cx-generic-link>
 </ng-container>

 

Test

Now, it is possible to influence CMS Component style directly from SmartEdit by pushing CSS inline setting in styleClasses field. In our example, we're adding border line color around some banner components.

CSS inline

SmartEdit setting

 

Rendering result

CSS mapping

SmartEdit setting

Rendering result

 

Conclusion

We just saw a PoC on styleClasses usage and how to decouple SAP Commerce CMS Component type from SAP Composable CMS Component rendering. 

SAP Expert Services can help you to design the best solution according business needs. You should not hesitate to request our service when you have a complex topic to address.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA FUNDS MANAGEMENT-Part 2 (what’s in it for private owned Customers)
entry.content:
Dear Sam, 

this seems to me an argument for budget structure usage. 
Please check OSS note https://me.sap.com/notes/1925799

If you do not want to use the budget structure you may try a workaround. 

The main object  is to obtain the budget on level 1 when you insert the budget on level 2. It is useless to make availability control to check level 1 (like in my requirement #3 ) if there is no budget there.

In order to do that you may try one of the Badis available for Budgeting data (for example FMKU_BUDGET_LINES)

Hope this help 

Best 

Gianluca

entry.title: Re: Can I use workforce in SAP DM without integration to...
entry.content:
Yes, you can! See Schedule Labor.
Manage Workforce app is part of SuccessFactors integration flow, see Onboarding Workforce.
In Schedule Labor 2.0, you probably don´t see any allocated workforce because you probably didn´t allocated it yet, see Schedule Labor 2.0 - Work Center Based, Select Workforce.

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Worfklow is not triggered after saving PR via ME51N
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you looked at the Event Log for the time that the PR was created?  Transaction SWEL, object type BUS2009, event RELEASESTEPCREATED.  

Otherwise, I'd take a look at SM58, ST22, and maybe try testing your workflow template from SWDD.

Good luck!

Sue

entry.title: Re: What is the object type of supplier invoice in SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hi Csaba,

Please use the Business Add-In (BAdI) Check of Creating Attachments in Display Mode (MRM_ATTACH_TO_READ_ONLY_CLOUD), you can define customer-specific checks for parked or posted invoices (both in display and edit mode).

Also you can check for the SAP object type

SupplierInvoice

Please reward, if the post is helpful.

Br,

Ramit

Hi,

I am looking for any methods that could assist in systematically verifying reports to ensure they are the original SAP standard versions. Any insights or best practices from your experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

entry.title: Re: In SAP Screen Personas scripting, how to check if the...
entry.content:
If you want to find out if there is currently a popup window on the screen, you can do this like:

if (session.idExists("wnd[1]")) {
... do something
}

To interrupt your current script in such a case, the action could simply be return;

I have updated as per the current release which is in the SAP Help Page. This release does not include Create purchase order option. 

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Is it possible to take raw materials from different plants.
entry.content: I have a raw material which is available in 3 plants including the planning plant. Is it possible to create the STO for the materials from those remaining 2 different plants via MRP?

entry.title: Re: How to Join Composition Data in a CDS View for Report...
entry.content:
Hi,

To include the nodeInvoiceLines data in your Reporting view and ensure it appears in the results, follow these steps:

  1. Update the Reporting View:
    Modify the Reporting view to include the nodeInvoiceLines composition explicitly. For example:

    javascript
     
    @readonly
    entity Reporting as select from Invoice {
    invoiceCode,
    status,
    type,
    company,
    date,
    customer,
    billCustomer,
    billAddress,
    externalReference,
    currency,
    netAmount,
    grossAmount,
    taxAmount,
    retentionAmount,
    salesUnit,
    invoiceUnit,
    externalSystem,
    month, // Include the computed month
    nodeInvoiceLines // Add the composition here
    };

  2. Expand the Composition in the Query:
    When querying the Reporting entity, use the $expand parameter to explicitly include the nodeInvoiceLines data. For example:

    text
    /Reporting?$expand=nodeInvoiceLines

    This ensures that data from nodeInvoiceLines is retrieved along with the Invoice data.

Best Practices:

  • Expose Compositions Explicitly: Always include compositions in the CDS view definition if you want them to be accessible in the reporting views.
  • Use Expands for Nested Data: Use $expand for retrieving nested or related data, ensuring efficient querying and avoiding unnecessary joins at the database level.

By including nodeInvoiceLines in your view and using the $expand parameter, you should be able to retrieve the desired data in your reporting view. Let us know if you face any further issues!

entry.title: Re: Operation Reporting API - Default Filter for Full Access
entry.content:
It seems you need to have a filter expression based on unique names, or
a pair of date filters (that is, a FROM filter and a TO filter, specifying a date range of at most 31 days)

I hope this link will be helpful.
https://help.sap.com/docs/ariba-apis/operational-reporting-api-for-procurement/view-template-structure

entry.title: Re: How to change the partner of a opportunity in customBO?
entry.content:
Hi 63abapdeveloper ,

you need to assign your custom BO to a different deployment unit as shown in my screenshot

In fact, to the deployment unit of the Opportunity BusinessObject which is CustomerRelationshipManagement.

 

 

 

By default, the deployment unit of your custom BO is the deployment unit that you selected when you created the solution.

 

 

Add annotation [DeploymentUnit(CustomerRelationshipManagement)] in the .bo definition file.

 

As documented here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CLOUD_APPLICATIONS_STUDIO/cbcebe3cfb1647a8b0322c18dbb0b481/7299254173e21014a353ab959bc64b69.html

entry.title: Re: Turning off notifications for Validation Rules updates
entry.content: Hello @William_Yu, by a button that has a javascript API "createMembers" in the Application Design.

entry.title: QM/PM_Master Inspection Characteristics assignment in General maintenance Task List_mass upload
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise how to assign Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) to General Maintenance Task List via mass upload. 

We had used Migration cockpit template General Maintenance Task List to upload Task List, however using this template we could not upload Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) as this field is not available. 

Now, our requirement is to mass upload Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) assigned to Task List Group in IA06 Transaction.  

Could you please advise whether any option is available for this in SAP Standard or any SAP upload tools should be used for this.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Re: Create New Payment Method - error
entry.content: Hi Shrinivas, hope you're fine! For this specific type of question, I suggest you to open a ticket for SAP in the development side. As per standard design, the SAP provide a limited alphanumeric ids available to use for payment methods. You need to speak this and ask for unlock others possible ids.

entry.title: Re: Publishing values to a recurring pay component from V...
entry.content:
Hi @Laura1 

Yes it is supported, I've never done it myself but I just found a conversation with a colleague where she said she was able to do it. Out of curiosity what is the business case ?

For her it was "to use CompInfo for Promotion Points assignment", not sure what it actually means to be honest. 

The only "standard" business case I could think of is to have the Target Bonus % edited on VarPay summary level screens then sent back to a recurring paycomponent.

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Automatic Requisition update based on Position field changes
entry.content:
Hello 
Thank you so much for the great details of the process 
I just cretaed the Business Rule and Integration Center 
However when i run the IC it shows no records to update even though i updated a position relation to one of my  job requisitions. 
I think the issue on  my side comes from the filter 'date change' (lastmodifieddate) from position as greater than last run time.
To be sure about it, i briefly changed my filter to the requisition id of the requisition that's linked to the changed position. In this case, the IC runs properly and the requisition fields from position are updated. 
Do you know how i can update my filter on latest date chang e? Am i missing something ? 
Regards, 
Margaux

This initiative has been immensely beneficial, providing access to high-quality resources and empowering learners like me to upskill effectively.
I am thrilled to have completed the "SAP Learning Journey Developing with SAP Integration Suite" program under the Digital Skills Initiative, and I am eager to leverage the opportunity to take a free certification attempt. This program is a shining testament to SAP's unwavering commitment to nurturing learning, growth, and innovation within the tech community.

Email: abdul.manan@tmcltd.com

Best Regards,
Abdul Manan.

entry.title: Re: Combining Market Min and Market Max in a new field to...
entry.content:
Hi @tdiehl12 

You need to turn the source columns into type=String otherwise it cannot be done. 

Once you have the Min and the Max custom columns as String then create a 3rd column and add the following formula:

customMin+"-"+customMax

 

 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Change GL account on AP PO Invoice in S4 Public Cloud
entry.content: Can I change the GL account on an AP PO invoice (for non material POs and account assignment K)? The issue is that the client does not want the final GL assignment to be done by the buyer when creating the PO. They also do not want to assign default GLs to the material group.

entry.title: REVIEW: New Layout / Features for SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
SAP Build Apps now has a new design-time UI that is intended to make it easier to navigate around the tool. Like with anything new, it might take a little while to get used to it. Here's a review and a few tips.

Most of the change is a rearrangement of where to find things:

  • Putting things you use most often on the main page (e.g., Preview).
  • Hiding things you use less often (e.g., Auth).
  • Rearranging or renaming buttons to make them more sensible (e.g., Variable and Integrations).  

In addition, there are some new or recent capabilities that are worth getting to know, now that they are more prominent.  

 

New UI

Here is a quick schematic of how the menu items were rearranged.

The top main menu bar now organizes the main capabilities in a more logical way, based on the classic MVC (model-view-controller) paradigm:

  • User Interface: The "view"
  • Variables: Essentially, this is the "controller" or "simple logic" since variables are used to create bindings, that create a way to respond to data and user actions. For more advanced logic, the logic canvas remains in the same place. Instead of a toggle between View and Variables – which was always a bit awkward – you now have clear buttons to go from User Interface to Variables. 
  • Integrations: The "model" or data, which now can come not just from data services but from processes and actions. 
  • App Settings: Other app-wide tasks that are done infrequently or even just once. 

 

Preview

The preview and build capabilities – especially the preview – are things I want all the time, and now they have dedicated buttons on the UI canvas.

One of things I never liked is how many clicks it took to open a preview.

  • With the new versioning feature, it could take up to 5 clicks to open a preview:
    1. Launch
    2. Open Preview Portal
    3. Open Web Preview
    4. Settings (on your app)
    5. Open Preview (of specific version) 
  • The new exposed button saves you the first click.

What would be nice is to have a button on the UI canvas that opens the web preview for the editable version right away. 

And perhaps you can help me, but I never understood being in a specific project, saying preview ... 

... and then again having to specify which project I want to run. 

TIP: Whenever I see someone go to Launch tab each time they want to preview an app it makes my blood boil 😡. Open a preview window, and then whenever you save your changes to the project, the preview window will automatically update.

 

Build and Publish (deploy)

Similarly, to get to the build area you no longer have to deal with the preview option – the Publish button now takes you straight to where you build and deploy your app.

PET PEEVE: I don't like having an in-between dialog before getting directly to the build Area – they saved me a step by not mixing preview and publish, but now they lost me a step by having to choose between versioning and publish. 

Note that for each build you must specify either a version (more on those later) or the latest editable state of the app.

 

Versioning

This is how versioning works:

  • Whenever you click Save, a "state" of the app is preserved. You can always restore that state – restoring means that the state is copied back on top of the current editable state (the original state remains in the history in the same place).
  • To view the states, you click the History (clock) icon.
  • When you want to mark a state as a new version, perhaps so you can deploy it, you click Publish and then Create a Release Version and it creates a new version for you. Basically, it's a marker for a specific state.

Here's what you see when you click the History icon.

And remember, when you make a build, you cannot choose a state but rather a version (or the current editable state).

 

Pages

The new interface for working with pages lets you navigate to a page or create a new page without first opening the pages area.

Directly from the UI canvas, you get a dropdown with an option Add New Page. You can also navigate to Show All Pages, which takes you to the same pages area UI as we previously had. Note that the pages area (as of time of writing this blog) shows your pages in alphabetical order.

The dropdown also shows the current page plus up to 4 other pages that you can directly navigate to. After a little testing, my understanding is that the dropdown shows:

  • The current page, plus the 2 previous pages and the 2 next pages.
  • If you are on the 1st or 2nd page or the last or second to last page, the list will be adjusted to show you up to 5 pages around the current page. 

Important to note that when I click Show All Pages, the pages are shown in alphabetical order. In the dropdown, the pages are shown in the order you created them.

 

Default App Layout

By default, a new project will be shown laid out as a full-screen web project. In the past, the default layout was for a mobile phone.

However, if you choose a mobile layout, SAP Build Apps remembers that choice in all your projects in that tenant, and will set the layout to mobile the next time you create a new project.

I am told that although the original tool was designed primary for building cross-platform mobile apps, most partners and customers are using SAP Build Apps as a way to quickly create web apps without coding or using profession front-end tools.

Notice that the selector for choosing the "floorplan" for your app has moved to the right side, but it is basically the same: a zoom dropdown and a device dropdown. Notice that the choices for device have been simplified.  

 

What do you think?

Please comment:

  • What do you think of the changes?
  • What other changes would you want?

😺

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere replication flow projection filter for...
entry.content:
You will have to replace the NULLs in the source. Do a CDS, with CASE WHEN "Field" IS NULL THEN '#' END f.e. 

I did not find a different way to do a filter on a NULL. Neither Variable, nor Parameter.

entry.title: Re: Wrong data type identified in calculations
entry.content: DSP messes up the datatypes. I always use CAST("FIELD" AS [datatype]) AS "FIELD", unless you can correct the datatype in the Attributes property - that is easier of course then to CAST

entry.title: Re: Inconsistent Replication Flow Behavior in SAP Datasphere

seems like you have it scheduled and the flow just waits for the next run

Initial and delta is in the same state

 

The "hanging" is OK for replication flow

The job + rule filled out the number of years since hire date and afterwards changed the hire date with the seinorityDate and the field is not filled out anymore. Do you happen to know why?

entry.title: Re: Problem with certificate PDF on SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Did you ever get a solution to this?

entry.title: The Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)" isn't selecting all assets in the ECC system
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

While migrating fixed assets using the Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)" using the Direct Transfer migration method in the Migration Cockpit, we see that not all assets from the table ANLA (in the ECC system) are being selected. Could you explain why this is happening?

Also, we want to migrate the sub assets of these main assets too. If those fixed assets won't be selected, how could we migrate their sub assets?

So, to summarize:

  • Why aren't all fixed assets of the ECC system not being selected by the Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)"?
  • How can we migrate the sub assets of these main assets not being selected?

Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition release is 2023 FPS 01.

Thanks!
Data migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)...
entry.content:
Dear team,

As you can see in the Migration Object's official documentation, there's a selection criteria for this Migration Object:

Selection Criteria: All fixed assets from the ANLA table, which do not have a deactivation date, are automatically selected for the company codes you specified when defining the migration scope.

This means that the fixed assets not being selected by the tool are very likely the ones that do have a deactivation date.

In regards to your second question, if you want to migrate fixed assets and their sub assets, it'd be suggestible to use the Staging Tables migration approach for this, as only the fixed asset Migration Objects using this migration method are capable of migrating both the main assets and their sub assets, and this must be done in the same Migration Project. You can check the full information about these objects below:

  • Fixed asset - Master data | If business function Universal Parallel Accounting is activated
  • Fixed asset (incl. balances and transactions) | If Universal Parallel Accounting is not activated

I hope this helps with your query!

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi community!

My name is Gabirel and I'm from Canada. I primarily work with SAC and am excited to join this community! I can't wait to delve into everything this community has to offer and share my own bits of knowledge.

entry.title: Pie Chart using R visualization in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP Analytics Cloud, traditional charts are highly effective for most use cases. However, there are times when we need to push the boundaries and create something truly unique. This is where custom R visualizations come into play, offering a powerful way to go beyond standard capabilities.

Our goal was straightforward: we wanted to create a clean, interactive pie chart without the traditional lines pointing to the values, while also enhancing the overall presentation.

In this blog, we’ll walk you through the process of designing an interactive pie chart using R visualizations in SAP Analytics Cloud

Step 1: Creating a Widget

Click on Insert->Others -> R visualization

Step 2: Choosing the model

Click on ‘Add Input data’ on the right pane and choose the model which you are going to build and the corresponding measures and dimensions and click on Ok Button.

.

Step 3: Writing the R Script

Click on ‘add script’ and you will get the below window where you can write your R scripts

Step 4: Scripting using R

Write the scripts, click on 'Execute' button to preview and finally click apply

library(plotly)

library(dplyr)

# Create the data frame

df = data.frame(

  product = MD_Test_Model$’Dimension 1’,

  val1 = MD_Test_Mode$’Test Calculation’)

#Note: After typing the model followed by $, when you press ‘Ctrl’ + Space, it lets you to choose the respective dimension/measure

# Summarize

df <- df %>%

  group_by(product) %>%

  summarise(val1 = sum(val1)) %>%

  arrange(desc(val1)) %>%

  mutate(percentage = val1 / sum(val1) * 100) # Calculate percentage for hover info

# Define custom colors for the pie chart

custom_colors <- c(

  "#1f77b4", "#ff7f0e", "#2ca02c", "#d62728", "#9467bd",

  "#8c564b", "#e377c2", "#7f7f7f", "#bcbd22", "#17becf"

)

# Creating the  pie chart

plot_ly(

  df,

  labels = ~product,

  values = ~val1,

  type = 'pie',

  textinfo = 'percent',             # Shows percentages on the pie slices

  hoverinfo = 'text',               # Customizes hover information

  text = ~paste("Value: ", val1, "<br>", "Percentage: ", round(percentage, 1), "%"), # Hover text

  marker = list(colors = custom_colors) # Applies custom colors

) %>%

  layout(

    title = "Title"

    margin=list(l=10,r=30,t=30,b=10),

    legend = list(

      orientation = "h",            # Places the legend horizontally

      x = 0.5,y=1.45,  xanchor = "center",  # Centers the legend

      font = list(size = 8        # Adjusts font size of the legend

    )

  )

The Pie Chart is Created

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024

Hello Community,

entry.title: Re: Using Default Route transit time in the Freight Unit scheduling
entry.content: Tip: you can use transportation zones for the start and/or end location of the sequence. Can save you a lot maintance.

entry.title: Vendor: Withholding Tax NOT extended in new company code
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the next issue, when I create an existing supplier for a new company code in the BP tcode.


In the company data section, I select "create with reference" but then upon entering, I check Vendor: Withholding Tax and the data isnt replicated in the new company code.

In ECC this situation didnt occur with tcode XK01 created as a model.

Please, I need to understand if it is possible in S/4

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Automatic source code formatting with ABAP in Eclipse
entry.content:
This is a great effort but the whole approach to code formatting in ABAP is flawed and I think comes from early code formatting in the 70's. In fact the term pretty print is from Bill Gosper in 1967. The code should be presented in the editor to the user based on the user's preferences. Those preferences should be similar to the Java formatting options in Netbeans. For example; Space after/before subroutines/methods, Indentation before/after key words. etc.

Who cares how the code is stored in the database. It should be presented to each user as that user prefers. Then there would be no issue with users having to reformat to meet their own requirements after another user has worked on the code.

Is anyone interested in working on a project to do this? I can't imagine SAP putting the time into it. There wouldn't be much payback in it for them.

entry.title: Microsoft has blocked macros from running
entry.content: When exporting a report from SAP to EXCEL 365 this one show Microsoft has blocked macros from running.

Hi guys

I'm working on house keeping activities in our BW/4HANA system SP16. I'm struggling finding DTP that has a filter with ABAP routine. I already look at the following tables but no success 

RSBKDTP, RSBKDTPH, RSBKDTPSTAT, RSBKDTPT, RSBKDTPTH, RSDDSTATDTP, RSBKDATAPAKSEL, RSBKSELECT, RSBKREQUEST, RSBKREQUEST_V, RSBKBP, RSBKDATAINFO, RSBKDATAPAKID, RSBKSUBSTEP, RSBKPATH, RSBKREQUESTRUN.

Is there any way to achived this?

Thank you all.

entry.title: Output length of SALV doesn't work in job mode
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently I use SALV for showing a report with three columns currency values. It works when I execute it normally, but when I execute it in job mode, the currency values are showed without separation of millions in some columns

Scenario 1

Scenario 2

 

I tried to specify a fixed output length, but it doesn't work when I execute in job mode because it continues to show me the columns with the same output length as the previous image.

I set these values for the currency values columns:

lo_column->set_currency_column( 'WAERS' ). " Column of my structe with the currency

lo_column->set_optimized( abap_false ).

lo_column->set_output_length( 30 ).

entry.title: Re: "Service instance currently unavailable error" in SAP Cloud trial account
entry.content: did it ever work ?

entry.title: #COE#BUMA OSS Case Dashboard and SAP For Me Cases API with ServiceNow
entry.content:
Hello All,

Are there any API related between SAP For Me OSS Cases and ServiceNow. We want to automate the creation of incident ticket once an OSS case is created. Automation involves when the OSS case was updated, the SNOW ticket will also be updated in the worknotes. Also, is there a dashboard where we can utilize in SAP For Me to see the report overview of all the OSS case status besides the SAP For Me > Services & Support > Cases.

Thank you!

entry.title: #COE#BUMA CPI Monitoring. Automation for extracting errors and long processing processes
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is there a way to create a monitoring dashboard in CPI monitoring that lists the long running processes and error messages?

Currently there is a way to check all error messages but cannot be exported (i.e. in excel file for tracking purposes).

We also have iflows that runs for hours, so we need to monitor proactively if processed successfully.

TiA!

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas - Admin question or rather your best pra...
entry.content: The documentation is a good place to start 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Personas - Admin question or rather your best pra...
entry.content: The documentation is a good place to start 🙂 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SCREEN_PERSONAS/b6a24c359e2142e3a86ff405f43ba282/04a8b1e59e3744fb99100fdbf4537d8f.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud & IBCS Top 10 (Part 5)
entry.content:
Hi @IngoH,

Thanks for your blog. We are attempting to accommodate certain IBCS standards within our organisational reporting, and one of the things I would love to offer is the trellis-style break in column charts between the current and future periods. I have tried to recreate this using any standard SAC functionality but have not been able to so far. Adding a trellis will come close, but SAC allocates equal screen space to each trellis element so at the start of the year the 'YTD' side would not have much data and would result in very wide bars while the forecast would have maybe 10 periods all squished up. Setting chart scaling for consistent width bars doesn't fix this as the trellis element with many bars will potentially introduce scrolling which is again not ideal.

About the only way I can see this actually being achievable in SAC would be through the use of scripting. We would have to use literally two separate charts side-by-side and then use scripting at initialisation to resize each of them according to how many periods are anticipated in each chart.

I am referring to this chart slipt shown below:

entry.title: Creation of new general modification / account modification
entry.content:
We need to create new General Modification (in Automatic Account Determination for GBB) and Account Modification (Maintain Account Assignment Categories).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Creation of new general modification / account modifi...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


Both General Modification and Account Modification are keys that have a different meaning depending on the business transaction and which is used to differentiate account determination. The meaning is preset in the SAP System and cannot be changed. Example: When making offsetting entries for inventory postings, you enter the the key which is assigned to the transaction type and posting string.

GBB_Offsetting Entry For Inventory Posting


If you would like to customize these keys, you can submit a feature request for this business requirement. This will inform our developers as to what additional functionality should be considered for future releases. 

2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: I want to fix the IP address of BTP.
entry.content: Thank you for your response, Akuller. I now understand that it will fall within a certain range of IP addresses. I look forward to your continued support.

entry.title: Re: SAP FICO Interview questions
entry.content:
Hi 

please find below my answers 

1. What is your strongest areasin GI and Controlling?GL, AP, AR, Banking, Tax, Asset Accounting
CO: Cost center, Profit Center, Internal Order, COPA
2. Do you have experience in S4HANA?Yes, I have experience in S4HANA
3. Major diff in Asset accounting in S4HANA?Technical clearing account, Depreciation, close and open Asset fiscal year.
4.DMEE Configuration 4-5 steps?Have you configured DME?Below are the Configuration Objectives
OBPM1 – Create Payment Medium Format
FBZP- Link Payment Medium Output to Payment Method
DMEE – Creation of DME Tree Structure and Format
OBPM4 – create variant for Payment Medium Output separation
5. To Trigger DMEE what is the configuration?In the payment method we will update the DMEE file format (Use payment medium workbench format)
6. Once Payment file is generated how the bank will know the file got generated in SAP?Bank will never know whether file generated or not in SAP, we need to send the file to bank, we have options to send file to bank, in my project we used PI interface send file from SAP To bank server.
7.Asset data migration ? How you will load the data into SAP system (2-3steps).How will you upload transaction data or Asset master data in LSMW?First we need to record the screen through LSMW (through which T.code we are loading) we need to record all the required (as per business need) fields then prepare the file then upload. Nearly 14 steps are there in LSMW before upload the file.
8.What you know about banking? Tell us about EBS config steps?(6-7 steps)1.Create House Bank and Account ID
2. Account symbol creation
3. Assign accounts to account symbol
4. Create keys for posting rule
5. Define posting rules
6. Create transaction type
7. Assign bank account to transaction types
9.Have you done the Internal orders settlement?By using KO88
10.What kind of file formats are there in EBS?BAI, BAI2, MT940, CAMT53 and Multi Cash formats.
11. Can you tell about  steps of Activate methodology?there are 6 phases in Activate methodology
Discover phase
Prepare phase
Explore phase
Realize phase
Deploy phase
Run phase

entry.title: Re: SAP FICO
entry.content:
Hi 

below are the some questions which i faced in recent interviews?

what are the GL difference between ECC and S4 HANA?

what is the purpose of Cash GL account?

explain document splitting concept with accounting entries?

what are the challenges you faced during migration from ECC to S4 HANA?

what is your roles and responsibilities during migration?

have you involved in cutover activities? 

which activities you performed during cutover activities as a FICO Consultant?

Have you worked on Integration with 3rd party systems? 

what is access sequence in FI MM integration? 

what the table level changes between ECC and S4 HANA?

how you migrate the code from ECC to S4 HANA?

entry.title: Re: Turning off notifications for Validation Rules updates
entry.content: Thanks for the update. At the moment, no way to eliminate the message. Let's see what could be done.

entry.title: I need to Change Date Format in report storie
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community, have any of you had the opportunity to convert a text date to datetime format? I have a report where I call a field that contains a date, but it gives me “04 Dec 2024” and I need to change it to dd/mm/yyyy format in order to allow me to perform calculations.

I would appreciate the support if anyone has had the experience.

entry.title: Inquiries regarding customizing statutory reports, financial statements and income statements
entry.content:
Dear Team,

The request from our customer to change the statutory reports in the same format as the one previously used system, as shown in the attached document.
( 1. Financial Statement and Income Statement Form (Requested by customer).pdf -> 2. Financial Statement and Income Statement Form (In ByDesign).jpg)

We knew that the statutory report form had to be changed using Adobe livecycle designer, so we tried to adjust it using that tool.
However, it is believed that there are several technical limitations.
We would like to inquire about a few specific matters.

First of all, unexpected numbering is printed in front of each item.
We attached screenshot about this problem.(3. Unexpected Numbering.jpg)
It was confirmed that the logic adding the numbering was not separately implemented in the logic that can be implemented on the adobe livecycle designer form.
If so, please check whether the description data itself is saved with numbering added like that in database.

2. Additionally, it appears that a column that displays the ratio of items corresponding to a specific hierarchical structure needs to be inserted, but we are inquiring again as we cannot resolve this issue.
Please check if this is technically feasible.
We attached screenshot about this inquiry. (4. Ratio column for specific hierachial structure item.jpg)

Please answer the above two points first, and comprehensively ask whether it is realistically possible to adjust the form to be exactly the same as the customer's desired form through the adobe livecycle designer tool.

Thank you

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How to get User details in BTP RAP
entry.content:
I_BusinessUserVH

it has dcl, make sure you have proper role if you want to preview it.

entry.title: Re: About the Coffee Corner – JOIN now, it’s interesting and fun!
entry.content: Thanks for creating this group, I am SAP Finance consultant, I am happy join here

entry.title: Re: Reference MIC and Class Char Problem
entry.content: Hi, Were you able to find any solution for this? I am facing the same problem.

entry.title: Using Adobe Services without JAVA
entry.content:
Hello - Below is our current ERP version. We are connecting SAP ERP ABAP system to SAP NetWeaver 7.3 JAVA system to perform ADS activities. 


But we are planning to retire the "NetWeaver 7.3 JAVA system" and wanted to know if there is any other way to use ADS functionality without connecting to JAVA system.


Please provide any direction. We couldn't find any SAP oss notes related to this.


Version:


EHP7 FOR SAP ERP 6.0  
SAP NETWEAVER    7.4


Thank you


PERSON_NAME Nade


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Using Adobe Services without JAVA
entry.content:
Hello Nade,

In this blog you can see SAP HANA Extended Application Services, Advanced Model (XSA) will be the successor platform for Adobe Document Services.
SAP plans to deliver this option during the support time frame of the S/4HANA 2025 release. You may need to consider to upgrade your ABAP system
if you want to use this solution.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/maintenance-strategy-adobe-forms-on-premise/ba-p/13627957

Best Regards

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite - Standard Edition - Multiple Tenants
entry.content: Thank you for your reply! Does that mean that if I want 2 tenants, then I will have to buy 2 basic/standard editions? I cannot just buy one edition and buy additional tenant?

entry.title: Re: Business Partner and Product Master Data Replication from On Premise to BTP using DRF
entry.content:
I'm trying to find a way to replicate products to multiple systems, each system has through its iflow.

Is there anyway to achieve that?

entry.title: SAP Business One licensing schema
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a question about SAP Business One version for HANA in virtualization environment, If I intends to utilize VMware SRM for Disaster Recovery Center (DRC) scenario, will there be any impact on their hardware key if I activate the secondary server? Will it change or the secondary server will using the same hardware key? In my experience, in SQL version the hardware key still the same, but how about in HANA version?

Thank you,

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Query Regarding Lift-and-Shift Process for RISE Migration
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are planning to execute a lift-and-shift migration and have the following queries related to the process:

1. HANA System Replication to RISE 

   We are looking to perform a lift-and-shift migration from our on-premises environment to RISE with SAP. Could you please confirm if it is feasible to use SAP HANA System Replication for this migration? If so, could you provide any specific guidelines or prerequisites for setting up HANA system replication between the on-premises system and RISE?

2. Backup During Lift-and-Shift

   In the context of lift-and-shift migration, we would like to understand how data backups should be handled during the migration process. Specifically:

   - How should the data backup be transferred to the migration server?

   - Will the migration mount point on the migration server need to be added to the on-premises server for this transfer, or is there a different recommended approach for ensuring proper backup handling during the migration?

We appreciate your assistance and look forward to your guidance on these topics.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding Lift-and-Shift Process for RISE Migra...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You can use HANA system replication to migrate to RISE with SAP.
Regarding to your concern, I would like to provide you with the relevant documents below.

  • General Prerequisites for Configuring SAP HANA System Replication

  • Copying and Moving Tenant Databases

  • Copy a System Using System Replication

  • Secure Configuration of the Network Connection

  • Copy or Move Tenants Within System Replication

  • 1999880 - FAQ: SAP HANA System Replication
    • 8. What are the basic requirements for the SAP HANA system replication network connection regarding throughput and latency?

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Production Order Stored Procedure Blocking Issue for...

Hope this helps,

SonTran
